data.title: US labor market shows a hiring slowdown - July saw only 73K new jobs, below expectations. April and June revised jobs slashed. Trump considers Fed takeover.
data.description: The U.S. labor market disappointed in July as the official jobs report showed a sharp hiring slowdown, with nonfarm payrolls rising by only 73,000 compared to the expected 110,000. Private sector added 83,000 jobs while government employment declined by 10,000. May and June saw significant downward revisions in job growth numbers, with May revised from 144,000 to 19,000, and June from 147,000 to 14,000. This made both months the worst for job growth since December 2020, wiping out a total of 258,000 jobs from earlier estimates. Wages, however, remained stable. This news reflects the impact of economic uncertainty from Trump's tariffs, with investors and the White House receiving an unwelcome reality check.

Fed's Hammack: Businesses have been dealing with high uncertainty.

data.title: EarthEn Energy launched its EarthEn Heat Battery at RE+ Storage on 7/31/25 to decarbonize industrial heat processes.
data.description: On August 1st, 2025, EarthEn Energy, a prominent climate technology company specializing in long-duration energy storage, introduced their EarthEn Heat Battery at RE+ Storage in Santa Clara on July 31st, 2025. This cutting-edge solution aims to reduce carbon emissions from high-temperature industrial heat processes.

data.title: Express Wash Concepts opens three new car wash locations in Greater Cincinnati, offering free Signature Washes from Aug 8-17 at Fairfield, Springdale, and Cincinnati.
data.description: Starting from August 8 to August 17, residents in the areas of 5274 Dixie Highway in Fairfield, 11346 Princeton Pike in Springdale, and 8301 Colerain Avenue in Cincinnati will have the opportunity to get free Signature Washes. This promotion is part of a larger initiative by Express Wash Concepts (EWC), a rapidly expanding express car wash company, with locations in Columbus, Ohio, and Cincinnati.

data.title: Shrub Oak International School in NY integrates farm program for autistic students, promoting holistic education.
data.description: In Mohegan Lake, N.Y., on August 1, 2025, Shrub Oak International School and The Pines at Shrub Oak offer diverse education approaches for autistic students. These include traditional classroom learning, extensive campus activities, and involvement in the school's active farm. Through their groundbreaking holistic curriculum, Shrub Oak aims to provide a comprehensive educational experience to students with autism.

data.title: Zap Consulting sees record growth with new insurance partnerships, driven by AI innovation.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina on August 1, 2025, Zap Consulting, a prominent provider of intelligent claims evaluation services, reported significant expansion driven by a surge in partnerships with insurance carriers and swift integration of their exclusive AI tool, Zap-Scan. This growth spurt has resulted in record-breaking numbers for the company.

data.title: T-Mobile completes acquisition of UScellular, adding over 4 million customers to its network, promising faster speeds and new perks for subscribers.
data.description: T-Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) has completed the acquisition of UScellular's wireless operations, benefiting over four million UScellular customers and businesses. This move will provide them access to high-speed internet on T-Mobile's superior network, offering new perks and savings on T-Mobile plans. In addition, hundreds of thousands of households in UScellular's service area will also benefit from this acquisition.

data.title: Market rally falls as Fed decision looms, Microsoft and Meta earnings released; 7 early movers.
data.description: The stock market rally shifted downwards after initially climbing, coinciding with the upcoming Federal Reserve decision and the quarterly earnings reports from tech giants Microsoft and Meta. The Dow Jones Futures indicated a drop in the market rally, with 7 key stocks making early moves. This development was highlighted in a recent article from Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Global PGHD market valued at $5.2 billion in 2024, projected to reach $7.5 billion by 2030, growing at 6.1% CAGR.
data.description: A report on "Patient Generated Health Data - Global Strategic Business Report" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global market size for Patient Generated Health Data was approximated at US$5.2 Billion in 2024 and is expected to reach US$7.5 Billion by 2030, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.1% during the forecast period from 2024 to 2030. This detailed report offers a thorough examination of market dynamics, factors influencing growth, and future projections, enabling strategic decision-making in the industry.
US CEA's Miran: Job revisions reflect May-June. Data from July is decent.

data.title: DoubleLine Income Solutions Fund (NYSE: DSL) declares $0.11/share distribution for August 2025.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, on August 1, 2025, the DoubleLine Income Solutions Fund announced a distribution of $0.11 per share for August 2025. This fund, traded as DSL on the NYSE, made the declaration. The distribution is subject to certain conditions and pertains to the shareholders of record as of a specified date.

data.title: Celebrating DOGust 1st® - the official birthday for all rescue dogs - highlighting the impact of adoption. #AdoptDontShop
data.description: Animal shelters, rescue organizations, and delighted adopters globally are shedding light on the significance of adoption and the transformative power of rescue dogs. Recognized on August 1, 2025, DOGust 1ST® marks the universal birthday for all rescue canines. This event is particularly significant as it emphasizes the impact of adoption in providing homes for countless dogs in need of care. The event aims to raise awareness about adoption and encourage more individuals to consider welcoming a rescue dog into their homes. Across the world, organizations involved in animal rescue and adoption are celebrating this special day, with an estimated total of 3,000 events being held in various locations to honor the occasion.

data.title: Supreme Industries acquires Orbia Building & Infrastructure (Wavin) business in India for $30 million, plus adjustments.
data.description: Orbia Advance Corporation S.A.B. de CV (BMV: Orbia) has recently confirmed the completion of a significant divestiture and technology licensing agreement with The Supreme Industries Ltd. (Supreme), India’s leading plastic pipe manufacturer. In this deal, Supreme has purchased Orbia Building & Infrastructure’s (Wavin) pipes and fittings business in India for a total of USD 30 million, with additional provisions for net working capital adjustments. This transaction marks a key milestone for both companies and solidifies Supreme's position in the market as it acquires a well-established business segment.

data.title: Job report indicates hiring slump due to Trump tariffs, likely Fed rate cut; S&P 500 futures drop.
data.description: A decrease in hiring and an increase in unemployment rates may prompt a possible interest rate cut. The impact of Trump's tariffs is revealed in a slowing job market, leading to speculation of a Federal Reserve intervention. Consequently, S&P 500 futures have dropped.

data.title: UScellular (USM) completes sale of wireless operations to Telephone & Data Systems, Inc. (TDS). Transaction successfully closed on Aug. 1, 2025.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, Array Digital Infrastructure, Inc. (NYSE: USM) formerly United States Cellular Corporation, and Telephone and Data Systems, Inc. (NYSE: TDS) reported the completion of the divestiture agreement. The successful closure of this deal marks a significant milestone for the Company.
